method: waterlens methodology — water_ml = energy_kWh × PUE × (WUE + WI_grid) × 1000

entries.notes: Reading 8 research docs, competitive analysis, design decisions, logo exploration, plan development
Astro scaffold, 3 parallel agents (site-builder, data-content, waterlens-cleanup), all components, pages, data, docs

notes: Token counts are estimates based on conversation length and agent work. Energy values for Claude Opus 4.6 have low confidence — Anthropic publishes no energy data. Total: ~800K input tokens + ~270K output tokens across research, building, and deployment.
